title: Module Page Type
description: Vocabulary for Courseforge weekly module page types. Also called 'page type' or 'module type' depending on emission site. Six values: five documented in agent specs plus 'discussion' which is emitted by generate_course.py but was previously undocumented (surfaced by Worker B's KG-quality review finding).
$comment: Values lifted from Courseforge/scripts/generate_course.py:647-759 (six _build_page_metadata call sites: overview, content, application, assessment, summary, discussion). Includes undocumented 'discussion' per Worker B KG-quality review finding. The companion file schemas/academic/courseforge_page_types.schema.json intentionally duplicates this enum as the academic-schema-domain reference; both stay in sync.
